form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 10 at Oakbank 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 18 over 1050m, on a slow track; 2.5 len behind Tour De Moon with 58kg at $4.80. Last start was disqualified from his Clare race 3yo+ Cg&E Mdn-Sw April 4 over 1100m. Racing well. Well placed and deserves another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in on jumping away and bumped Johnny The Jet.
Raced greenly over the concluding stages of the event.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after six months 3rd of 9 at Oakbank 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on April 6 over 1050m, slow going 0.5 len behind Darlinc carrying 58kg at $7.50. Previously second-up 12th of 14 at Morphettville Parks 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on July 19 over 1000m, on a slow track; 13 len behind Anecdotal carrying 58kg at $201. Winning chance with that run under the belt.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid in under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: Resuming after nine months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign eighth of 14 at Gawler 3yo+ Mdn-Sw July 5 over 1200m, soft track; 11 len behind Koratora carrying 57.5kg at $101. When resuming last campaign sixth of 12 at this track 3yo+ Mdn-Sw May 21 over 1200m, 4 len behind Embellisher with 54.5kg at $12. Has claims if presented on song.

form.formComment: Gelding by D'argento making his first appearance. Ran 3rd in a Murray Bridge trial over 1000m on February 5. Cannot be underestimated.

form.formComment: Second-up. Promising on debut came home strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 9 at Murray Bridge 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on November 19 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind Beyond Mysti carrying 54.5kg at $17. Returned from break ran last of 11 at Morphettville Parks 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 21 over 1250m, 12 len behind City Pro carrying 55.5kg at $3.90. Will come on from that run and will be tough to beat.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently ran on from midfield; 2nd of 9 at Oakbank 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on April 6 over 1050m, slow going nose behind Darlinc with 55kg at $11. The run before that 3rd of 10 at Port Lincoln 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1000m, 4 len behind Golden Tunes with 55kg at $19. Should hold the form and she appeals as one of the hardest to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Stood flat footed as the start, affected and lost ground.
Stood flat-footed and missed the start by several lengths.
Slow to begin. Raced wide throughout.
